query: I just reworked the zone assignment in api_route — can you spin up the ffxiv craft planner and confirm the route still renders right?
run the craft planner, add Bronze Ingot and a Cross-pein Hammer as targets, calculate and plan the route, and tell me if there are any console errors
I edited the breakdown_multi aggregation, make sure nothing broke end to end in the app before I commit
does the crystals & shards fold-in note still show up in the route UI after my change to _assign_items_to_zones?
can you take a screenshot of the planner with a couple of targets and a computed route so I can see it?
verify the multi-target flow still works after my edits to the embedded JS
start the app and check that adding two items and planning a route actually works
smoke test the planner for me, I changed how the aggregated gathering log renders
add a new zone to ZONE_DATA for the Dawntrail region with its teleport cost and coords
write a pytest case for parse_recipe covering an ingredient with a zero amount
explain how the repeated nearest-neighbor TSP solver picks the starting zone
the CI workflow is red on python 3.10 — look at the pytest output and figure out what failed
update the README to describe the new crystal fold-in behavior
why does get_gathering_locations return an empty list for item 12345? dig into the XIVAPI calls
bump the flask version in requirements.txt and make sure the lockfile is consistent
refactor classify() to use a dict lookup instead of the keyword loops
how do I deploy this Flask app to a small VPS behind nginx?
add a loading spinner to the search box while results are fetching
grep the codebase for everywhere we call xiv_get and list the endpoints we depend on
the app.py edit keeps failing with 'string to replace not found' — what's going on with this file?
